overview: ChickenHunt is a fast-paced chicken shooting game on the Internet Computer with 9 unique worlds, a full social system with clans, clan chat, and a friend list.
features: 9 animated worlds with unique visuals and sounds
Clan system: create, search, join clans
Telegram-style clan group chat with optimistic UI
Friend system: add/remove friends from profiles
User profiles with all game statistics
